chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 115 of 2025 Criminal Bail Application No.S- 944 of 2025 Criminal Bail Application No.S- 945 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.11.2025. Mr. Muhammad Qasim Samoon, Advocate for applicant in Criminal Bail Application No.S-115/2025. M/s Pir Bux Bhurgri and Saeed Ahmed, Advocates for applicants in Criminal Bail Application No.S-944 & 945/2025. Mr. Azhar Hussain Solangi, Advocate for complainant Ramesh Kumar. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State alongwith IO / ASI Basham Khan PS Tando Ghulam Hyder. = For the reasons to be recorded, the applicants Sulleman s/o Wahid Bux Lakho and Liaquat Ali s/o Lakhi alias Meer Laghari are granted post arrest bail in Crime No.86/2025 registered at P.S Tano Ghulam Hyder u/s 397 PPC as well as Crime No.90/2025 registered at P.S Tando Ghulam Hyder u/s 25 Sindh Arms Act, 2013, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac) each and P.R Bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE Tufail
